name: Relic
description:
Eridian Relic. A common relic that increases shock elemental damage.

In Borderlands 2, relics are passive gear items that raise one or more character stats. Their effects vary widely and can improve certain stats that are otherwise hard to increase. Unlike Artifacts, relics do not modify Action Skills, are not class-locked, and may be elemental or non-elemental. Relics only appear in Borderlands 2 and are Eridian-made.
notes: For relics with percentage-based bonuses, the final value depends on both the relic level and its grade. Grades range from 7 to 15, so a higher-level relic can sometimes roll weaker stats than a lower-level one. The same scaling applies with Overpower levels; the strongest rolls are typically found at the highest Overpower level with grade 15.
